title: browser-use MCP Server Configuration
description: Configuration for the browser-use MCP server, which exposes a Playwright-powered Chromium browser as a set of MCP tools. The server is launched as a background process and communicates over WebSocket on port 8765.

tools.name: navigate_url
tools.description: Navigate the browser to a specified URL and wait for the page to finish loading.

url.description: The fully qualified URL to navigate to.

tools.name: web_click
tools.description: Click on a DOM element identified by a CSS selector or XPath expression.

selector.description: CSS selector or XPath identifying the element to click.

tools.name: web_type
tools.description: Type text into a form input element identified by a CSS selector or XPath.

selector.description: CSS selector or XPath identifying the target input element.

text.description: The text to type into the input field.

tools.name: web_extract
tools.description: Extract content from the current page or a specific element.

selector.description: Optional CSS selector or XPath for a specific element. Omit for full-page extraction.

format.description: Output format for the extracted content.

tools.name: web_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the current browser viewport.

path.description: Optional absolute path to save the screenshot. Returns image data if omitted.

tools.name: web_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the page in a specified direction.

tools.name: web_wait
tools.description: Wait for a condition or element to appear on the page.

condition.description: A CSS selector, network state keyword ('networkidle', 'domcontentloaded'), or descriptive condition string.

timeout.description: Seconds to wait before timing out.
